mapper.sql: from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 0 and h.bill_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_ROW_HIGH' and h.consume_bill_status = 2 inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and e.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(e.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_department d on d.id = h.department_id left join fd_supplier sup on sup.id = cast(nullif(trim(e.supplier_id), '') as unsigned) and sup.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_high_consume_confirm c on c.id = l.confirm_id and c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join his_inpatient_charge_mirror inp on l.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and inp.id = l.mirror_row_id and inp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join his_outpatient_charge_mirror outp on l.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and outp.id = l.mirror_row_id and outp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.gz_dep_inventory_id is not null
mapper.select:
select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, ifnull(l.confirm_status, 0) as confirmStatus, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time, h.consume_bill_date) as consumeAuditTime, e.id as consumeEntryId, e.material_id as materialId, e.material_name as materialName, e.unit_price as unitPrice, coalesce(l.alloc_qty, e.qty) as entryQty, e.amt as amt, e.supplier_id as supplierId, sup.name as supplierName, e.batch_no as batchNo, e.batch_number as batchNumber, e.begin_time as beginTime, e.end_time as endTime, e.main_barcode as mainBarcode, e.sub_barcode as subBarcode, e.material_speci as materialSpeci, e.material_model as materialModel, e.factory_id as factoryId, h.department_id as departmentId from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 0 and h.bill_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_ROW_HIGH' and h.consume_bill_status = 2 inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and e.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(e.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_supplier sup on sup.id = cast(nullif(trim(e.supplier_id), '') as unsigned) and sup.tenant_id = l.tenant_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.gz_dep_inventory_id is not null and l.id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_line ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, consume_link_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.consumeLinkId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})

insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_bill ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, supplier_id, bill_type, stk_io_bill_id, bill_no, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.billType}, #{e.stkIoBillId}, #{e.billNo}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})
mapper.update:
update his_mirror_consume_link set confirm_status = 1, confirm_id = #{confirmId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 0 and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select max(confirm_no) from gz_high_consume_confirm where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, confirm_id as confirmId, supplier_id as supplierId, bill_type as billType, stk_io_bill_id as stkIoBillId, bill_no as billNo from gz_high_consume_confirm_bill where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_id = #{confirmId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 order by supplier_id, bill_type
